text: Have you ever wondered what it would be like to talk to an AI that sounds completely human?
I think about it all the time. The technology is already here.
Not really. I think it opens up incredible possibilities. Imagine audiobooks where every character has a unique voice.
That's a great point. Or language learning apps where you can practice with a natural-sounding partner.
Exactly. The key is using this responsibly.
Agreed. Transparency matters — people should know when they're hearing a synthetic voice.
One hundred percent. Trust is the foundation.
